    • fillWithStandardProperties

      protected void fillWithStandardProperties()
      Fills the properties with default values
      • SHOW_BIRTHDAYS_COUNT == 10
      • SAVED_LOCALE == en_EN
      • AUTOSAVE == false
      • WRITE_THRU == false
